title: Factor Parameters — Electricity (v1.0)
description: Parameter sub-schema applied when factor_record.factor_family == 'electricity'. Encodes GHG Protocol Scope 2 Guidance dual-reporting requirements. Frozen v1.0 — 2026-04-22.

scope_applicability.description: Electricity factors default to scope_2; T&D-loss factors may be scope_3.

uncertainty_low.description: Lower 95% CI as signed fractional deviation.

uncertainty_high.description: Upper 95% CI as signed fractional deviation.

electricity_basis.description: GHG Protocol Scope 2 basis. 'location_based' uses grid-average intensity; 'market_based' reflects contractual instruments; 'supplier_specific' is the contracted supplier's disclosed mix; 'residual_mix' is the market-based factor after contractual instruments are removed (AIB-style).

residual_mix_applicable.description: True when this factor is the residual mix for the given region/year. At most one residual_mix factor may be 'active' per (country, region, grid_region, valid_from..valid_to) window.

supplier_specific.description: True when this factor represents a specific supplier contract (e.g., a green tariff). Implies electricity_basis == 'supplier_specific'.

transmission_loss_included.description: True when transmission & distribution losses are already embedded in the emission intensity (delivered basis). False means busbar / generation basis.

certificate_handling.description: Contractual instrument reflected in this factor: 'none' (no instrument), 'rec' (US REC), 'go' (EU Guarantee of Origin), 'ppa' (Power Purchase Agreement), 'i_rec' (International REC).

subregion_code.description: Grid sub-region code (e.g., 'eGRID-SERC', 'NERC-WECC', 'ENTSOE-DE-LU'). Mirrors factor_record.jurisdiction.grid_region for in-parameters resolution convenience.
